svg.aria-label: Aurora Nexus banner: Mohammad Umar — Chief AI Officer at Kanban Studios. Agentic AI, full-stack, Industry 4.0/5.0, 6x competition podiums. A floating isometric tech island projects the name as a hologram into an aurora-lit cosmos, with data bridges, a drone, a wind turbine and a ringed planet.
svg.title: Mohammad Umar — aurora nexus hologram banner
